parameters.query: INSERT INTO quick_take_jobs (job_id, status) VALUES ('{{ $json.job_id }}', 'processing') RETURNING job_id;

SELECT a.preview_video_url, a.preview_video_alpha_url, a.motion_avatar_id, p.voice_id, p.voice_settings, p.display_name
FROM avatars a
JOIN persons p ON a.person_id = p.id
WHERE a.id = '{{ $('Init Job').first().json.avatar_id }}';
SELECT cloudinary_url FROM client_backgrounds WHERE id = '{{ $('Init Job').first().json.background_id }}';
UPDATE quick_take_jobs SET status = 'complete', video_url = '{{ $('API: Creatomate Check').first().json.url }}', updated_at = NOW() WHERE job_id = '{{ $('Init Job').first().json.job_id }}';
UPDATE quick_take_jobs SET status = 'failed', error_message = 'Creatomate render failed', updated_at = NOW() WHERE job_id = '{{ $('Init Job').first().json.job_id }}';
INSERT INTO quick_take_jobs (job_id, status) VALUES ('{{ $json.job_id }}', 'processing') RETURNING job_id;
